title: What is the Foot Pursuit Challenge?
transcript:
This cop is in hot pursuit, but she's not a suspect.
She's his wife.
This cop is also giving chase.
Seconds later, his wife is captured.
So what's going on?
It's part of a new viral trend sweeping social media.
Wives trying to outrun their police officer husbands.
It's called the Foot Pursuit Challenge to the tune of the Bad Boys theme from Cops.
Watch as this wife gets a head start, but 20 seconds later, apprehended.
I spoke with Acasia Vincent and her patrol officer husband Rick of Cedar City, Utah.
Acasia, what did you think? Did you think you had a chance?
No, I didn't, I haven't exercised since like 2016,
so I was like, no, it'll be quick, but I'm faster than I thought.
He's pretty good on the chase?
Yeah, we cut out the part where he tried to handcuff me...
